rs11103338.description: Ancestry Informative Marker for South Asian populations.

rs10456369_sou.description: Indo-Iranian Border Marker - informative for populations of the Northwest Subcontinent and Eastern Plateau.

rs16139_sou.description: South Asian Specific Marker - informative for distinguishing Indo-European speaking populations of the subcontinent.

rs10954737_sou.description: Dravidian Ancestry Marker - highly diagnostic for Southern Indian and Sri Lankan populations.

rs1426654_sou.description: SLC24A5 variant - highly informative for West Eurasian and South Asian populations.

rs10456302_sou.description: Ancestral South Indian (ASI) Marker - diagnostic for the indigenous populations of the Indian subcontinent.

rs2816030_sou.description: SLC24A5 variant - associated with lighter skin pigmentation, prevalent in South Asian populations.

rs12146713_sou.description: South Asian Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from the Indian subcontinent.

rs11030104_sou.description: South Asian Ancestry Marker - informative for Indo-Aryan and Dravidian populations.

rs10456236_sou.description: Punjabi Ancestry Marker - informative for Northern Indo-Aryan populations.

rs10456282_sou.description: SAS/MENA Tie-Breaker - Highly specific to the Indian subcontinent, prevents misclassification as Iranian/Middle Eastern.

rs10456284_sou.description: SAS/EAS Tie-Breaker - Differentiates populations south of the Himalayas from East/Southeast Asian groups.

rs10456288_sou.description: SAS/EUR Tie-Breaker - Diagnostic for Ancestral South Indian (ASI) components, effectively absent in Europe.

rs10456290_sou.description: SAS/EAS Tie-Breaker - Anchors Indo-Aryan genetics, strongly separating the subcontinent from East Asia.

rs10456302_sou_2.description: SAS/MENA Tie-Breaker - Diagnostic for deeper South Asian (AASI) lineages.

rs6119471_sou.description: Ancestral South Indian (ASI) Marker - highly diagnostic for the indigenous Neolithic populations of the South subcontinent.

rs12203592_sou.description: Ancestral North Indian (ANI) Marker - informative for the West Eurasian related expansion into the Northern subcontinent.

rs16891982_sou.description: West Eurasian-South Asian Cline Marker - helps distinguish the level of Western Eurasian admixture in the subcontinent.

rs11190870_sou.description: Austroasiatic/Munda Indian Marker - diagnostic for the early Austroasiatic speaking populations of Central and Eastern India.

rs7431289_sou.description: Western Indian Informative Marker - highly prevalent in Indo-Aryan speaking populations of Western India.

rs16892766_sou.description: South Asian-Caspian Cline Marker - indicative of West Eurasian admixture in North India.

rs11122334_sou.description: Dravidian Genomic Marker - characteristic of the Southern Indian subcontinent.
